resources.string:
"- Malware Scanner: Detect and remove malicious threats.
- Network Scanner: Identify vulnerabilities in your Wi-Fi network.
- App Lock: Protect your apps with a secure lock.
- Cyber Chatbot: Get instant security advice and support.
- Battery Monitor: Optimize battery usage for extended life.
- Z-Browser: Browse securely with enhanced privacy.
- Intruder Selfie: Capture photos of unauthorized access attempts.
- Gallery Vault: Securely hide your private photos and videos.
- Call & SMS Scanner: Filter spam and suspicious communications.
- Security Monitor: Real-time protection against various threats.
- App Management: Easily manage installed applications.
- Secure Notepad: Keep your sensitive notes private.
"Unleash the full potential of Secura.\nEach card reveals a new layer of your personalized protection."
